overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a red plaid jacket traversing a snowy mountain town. The character walks from snow-covered hillsides onto a paved road and back to snow paths, approaching a large ski jump structure with snow-capped mountains visible in the background throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered hillside with scattered pine trees and residential chalets

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through deep snow toward the road, navigating between scattered pine trees and patches of vegetation

entered.detail: snowy terrain with footprints and scattered grass patches
tall evergreen trees scattered across the hillside
two-story residential building with red roof and wooden facade
small purple flowers emerging from snow patches
large white mountain range visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open snowy hillside dotted with pine trees and purple wildflowers. Residential chalets are visible on the left and right sides of the frame, with a massive snow-capped mountain range dominating the background under clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved road through mountain residential area

events.description: character steps from snow-covered terrain onto paved asphalt road
character turns left to follow the curving road through the neighborhood

agents.ego_description: walking along the center of the paved road, passing street lamps and houses on both sides

entered.detail: two-lane paved road with yellow dividing lines
modern street light pole along the roadside
wooden log barriers along the left edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a paved asphalt road, leaving the deep snow behind. The road curves through a quiet mountain residential area with chalets on both sides, street lamps lining the left side, and log barriers visible along the roadside. The character follows the road as it bends left through the neighborhood.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow path alongside road leading to ski jump

events.description: character steps from paved road back onto snow-covered path beside the road
large ski jump ramp structure becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along snow-covered path parallel to the road, approaching a large ski jump structure

entered.detail: set of concrete steps leading up the snowy hillside
large artificial ski jump structure with steep incline and blue markings
blue painted lines on the snow leading to the jump

segments.scene_description: The character moves back onto snow-covered terrain alongside the road, passing concrete stairs on the left. As the character continues uphill, a massive ski jump ramp structure comes into view ahead, marked with blue lines on the snow. The road remains visible to the right while the character approaches the jump structure with snow-capped mountains looming in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wild, snowy hillside into a quiet residential neighborhood and finally toward a massive athletic structure. It begins with the character traversing an open expanse of deep snow dotted with pine trees and purple wildflowers, with residential chalets and towering snow-capped mountains framing the horizon. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts from soft snow to a curving paved asphalt road lined with street lamps and log barriers that wind through the mountain village. The scene then transitions back onto snow-covered ground as the character passes concrete stairs and climbs uphill. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a massive ski jump ramp marked with blue lines, with the distant mountain range looming large in the background.
